subject: Laptop screen flickering
description: My Dell laptop screen has been flickering intermittently since yesterday. It's making it hard to work.
reasoning: Screen flickering indicates a hardware problem with the laptop display.
resolution_notes: Assigned to Desktop Support for Hardware Issue (Medium urgency).
email_body:
Subject: Update on your ticket INC002 – Laptop screen flickering

Hi Jane,

Thanks for reaching out about the flickering screen. Your ticket (INC002) has been assigned to our Desktop Support team. A specialist will contact you shortly to resolve the issue. No action is needed from you at this time.
